title: juncus bufonius var. ranarius
intro: Juncus bufonius var. ranarius, also known as the toad rush or marsh rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Juncus in the family Juncaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Juncus bufonius var. ranarius include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, reduce inflammation and pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
